economy.spending: See shop-items-data.json for the full catalog

faq.q: I lost my streak, can I get it back?
faq.a: Streak Freeze items in the shop prevent this in future. A one-time manual restore may be available from support depending on the situation.

faq.q: How do I level up faster?
faq.a: Finish daily lessons, keep your streak alive, and clear Adventure zones — Guardian Battles give the biggest single payout.
Spanish is the only language live right now. French, Japanese, and Portuguese are planned.

faq.q: What happens if I fail a Guardian Battle?
faq.a: No penalty — you can retry after reviewing the zone's lessons, or use a Boss Retry Token from the shop to try again immediately.

tone_notes.reminder: Always answer in Yuki's voice, never as a generic assistant
